senses.definition: a place where a person can have their make-up done or receive hair, face, etc. treatments to look more attractive

examples.x: The beauty salon buzzed with activity as stylists tended to their clients, transforming hair and nails with precision and care.
Soft music played in the background of the beauty salon, creating a relaxing ambiance for patrons to unwind and pamper themselves.
The beauty salon offered a wide range of services, from haircuts and coloring to manicures, pedicures, and spa treatments.
As the bride-to-be sat in the stylist's chair, anticipation filled the air of the beauty salon as her bridal look was meticulously crafted.
The beauty salon's expert makeup artists skillfully enhanced their clients' natural features, leaving them feeling confident and glamorous.

senses.definition: (of two or more things or people) having qualities, characteristics, appearances, etc. that are very similar but not identical

examples.x: The two houses had nearly alike floor plans, with only minor differences in layout.
The siblings had alike tastes in music, often borrowing each other's albums.
The two models had strikingly alike bone structures, making them ideal candidates for twin-themed photo shoots.
Despite their different backgrounds, they found they had alike values and aspirations in life.
The grandfather shared many alike traits with his grandson, from their mannerisms to their taste in music.

senses.definition: moving uncomfortably in a way that lacks grace and confidence

examples.x: Sarah's awkward dance moves drew laughter from her friends during the talent show.
She tripped over her own feet in an awkward attempt to impress her crush.
The dance routine they had practiced for weeks fell apart in an awkward mess during the performance.
His attempt to juggle oranges ended in an awkward mess as they bounced off the walls and rolled under the table.
The toddler's first steps were awkward and unsteady as he wobbled across the room.

senses.definition: small and attractive in shape, structure, or appearance

examples.x: The delicate ballerina moved across the stage with grace and precision, captivating the audience with her elegant movements.
She had delicate features, with porcelain skin and soft, doe-like eyes that gave her an ethereal beauty.
Despite her delicate appearance, she possessed inner strength and resilience that helped her overcome life's challenges.
He had delicate hands, nimble and skilled in the art of surgery, capable of performing intricate procedures with precision.
The delicate flower girl walked down the aisle, scattering rose petals with each step, adding a touch of sweetness to the wedding ceremony.

senses.definition: moving or behaving in an elegant, pleasing, and attractive way

examples.x: She walked with a graceful stride, her movements fluid and elegant.
The ballerina's performance was breathtakingly graceful, captivating the audience with her poise and agility.
With a graceful bow, the actor thanked the audience for their applause at the end of the play.
The dancer moved with graceful precision, her every gesture filled with grace and beauty.
The egret soared through the sky with a graceful sweep of its wings, a symbol of elegance and freedom.

senses.definition: having a refined and graceful appearance or style

examples.x: She wore an elegant gown to the gala, turning heads with her timeless beauty.
The bride looked stunning in her elegant wedding dress, radiating grace and charm as she walked down the aisle.
The bride's hairstyle was simple yet elegant, with cascading curls framing her face in soft waves.

senses.definition: fully-grown and physically developed

examples.x: Despite her young age, she possessed a mature appearance, with features that belied her years.
The actor's mature face bore the lines of experience and wisdom, adding depth to his performances on screen.
Her mature figure was accentuated by the elegant dress she wore, highlighting her curves and sophistication.
His mature stature commanded attention in the room, his broad shoulders and confident posture making him stand out from the crowd.
Her mature physique was graceful and poised, a result of years spent practicing ballet and yoga.

senses.definition: ugly and extremely unpleasant to the sight

examples.x: The painting depicted a hideous monster with twisted features and glowing eyes, sending shivers down the viewers' spines.
She wore a hideous outfit that clashed horribly, drawing unwanted attention wherever she went.
The sculpture was meant to be abstract, but many found its distorted form to be downright hideous.
The villain in the movie had a hideous scar running down his face, adding to his menacing appearance.
The creature emerging from the swamp was hideous, with slimy tentacles and jagged teeth.

senses.definition: (of a man's face) not having been shaved for a long time

examples.x: He hadn't shaved in days, leaving his scruffy face covered in stubble.
The actor sported a scruffy beard for his role as a rugged mountain man.
His scruffy appearance gave him a rough-around-the-edges charm that many found endearing.
The young man's scruffy chin contrasted sharply with his neatly styled hair.
Despite his scruffy appearance, he had a warm smile that instantly put people at ease.

senses.definition: (of a person) dressed in worn and old clothes

examples.x: He showed up to the job interview looking shabby, with wrinkled clothes and unkempt hair.
Despite his shabby appearance, he had a kind heart and a warm smile that brightened the room.
After a long night of partying, she looked shabby and disheveled as she stumbled out of the club.
The traveler looked shabby after days of hiking through the mountains, with dirt smeared on his face and clothes.
The traveler, dressed in shabby attire, carried only a small bag.

senses.definition: (of a person's skin) having a dark color after being exposed to the sun
(of a person) standing or sitting with a straight back

examples.x: The monk meditated in an upright lotus position, spine like a steel rod.
Her upright bearing betrayed her ballet training.
An upright sitting position reduces back pain.
She maintained an upright posture during the meditation session.
His upright silhouette cut against the sunset.

senses.definition: (of a person or body part) attractively thin

examples.x: She had a slender figure, with long limbs and a graceful posture.
The model walked down the runway with a slender frame, captivating the audience with her elegance.
His fingers were slender and nimble, perfect for playing the piano.
The young deer had slender legs that carried it gracefully through the forest.
Her slender fingers delicately traced the contours of the sculpture, admiring its intricate details.

senses.definition: (of a person) physically attractive with large muscles
(of a person) powerful with large well-developed muscles

examples.x: He had a muscular build, with well-defined arms and a broad chest.
The athlete's muscular legs propelled him to victory in the race.
Despite his slender frame, he possessed surprisingly muscular arms from years of rock climbing.
The bodybuilder had a muscular physique sculpted from hours spent lifting weights at the gym.
Her muscular back rippled with strength as she lifted the heavy boxes effortlessly.

senses.definition: (of a person) large but not fat

examples.x: He inherited his big-boned build from his father, making him naturally strong and resilient.
The big-boned dog had a robust physique, with a broad chest and powerful legs.
She struggled to find clothes that fit her big-boned frame, often having to shop in the men's department for larger sizes.
He joked about his big-boned stature, often referring to himself as "solid" rather than overweight.
Despite her big-boned appearance, she had a gentle demeanor and warm smile that put others at ease.

senses.definition: (of a person) slightly fat and heavy

examples.x: The stout man lumbered down the street, his heavyset figure moving with determination.
Despite his best efforts to lose weight, he remained stout and struggled to fit into his clothes.
The stout man struggled to squeeze through the narrow doorway, his large belly grazing the frame.
She waddled down the street, her stout figure swaying from side to side with each step.
The stout woman huffed and puffed as she climbed the stairs, her heavyset frame slowing her progress.

senses.definition: very ugly in a strange or funny way

examples.x: She recoiled in horror at the sight of the grotesque creature lurking in the shadows.
The artist created a series of grotesque sculptures, with twisted forms and contorted faces.
The mask he wore at the masquerade ball was grotesque, with exaggerated features and sinister eyes.
The abandoned doll had a grotesque appearance, with missing limbs and cracked porcelain.
The grotesque painting depicted a nightmarish scene with distorted faces and contorted bodies.

senses.definition: (of a person) not very attractive

examples.x: Despite her homely appearance, she had a warm and engaging personality that drew people to her.
She was not the most homely woman in the world, but she was certainly not beautiful.
He was a homely child, but he grew up to be quite handsome.
The homely girl stood out in a crowd with her simple dress and unassuming demeanor.

senses.definition: (of a person's appearance) clean and attractive

examples.x: He made sure to dress in a presentable manner for the job interview, wearing a crisp suit and tie.
The students were reminded to maintain a presentable appearance during the school field trip.
The children made an effort to look presentable for their grandparents' visit, combing their hair and tucking in their shirts.
The actor always appeared presentable on the red carpet, with impeccable grooming and stylish attire.

senses.definition: pleasing and likely to arouse interest or desire
mysteriously attractive or exciting

examples.x: Her alluring smile and captivating eyes drew everyone's attention in the room.
Despite her modest attire, there was something undeniably alluring about her graceful movements.
The actress had an alluring presence on stage, commanding the audience's attention with every word.
Despite her understated makeup, there was an alluring radiance to her complexion that caught everyone's eye.
His alluring physique, sculpted through hours of dedicated exercise, turned heads wherever he went.

senses.definition: extremely impressive and attractive

examples.x: The bride looked absolutely magnificent in her flowing white gown as she walked down the aisle.
The actor's magnificent physique drew admiring glances from all who saw him on the red carpet.
Her magnificent smile lit up the room, bringing joy to all those around her.
Despite his advanced age, the elderly gentleman had a magnificent air about him, with sharp features and a dignified demeanor.
The prince was a magnificent sight as he rode into the courtyard on his white stallion, his royal attire shimmering in the sunlight.

senses.definition: having an attractive and pleasing quality

examples.x: Despite her simple attire, there was something undeniably charming about her natural beauty.
His charming good looks and easygoing personality made him popular among his peers.
The actress had a charming presence on screen, with a magnetic charisma that drew audiences in.
The waiter's charming smile and friendly manner made dining at the restaurant a delightful experience.
Her charming mannerisms made her stand out at the party.

senses.definition: exceptionally eye-catching or beautiful

examples.x: His striking blue hair and elaborate tattoos made him a memorable figure in the local art scene.
His striking green eyes seemed to sparkle with intelligence and curiosity.
He had a striking look with his tall frame and distinctive tattoos, making him unforgettable.

senses.definition: extremely good

examples.x: She had a superb sense of style, always impeccably dressed and effortlessly chic.
Despite her age, she maintained a superb appearance, with flawless skin and radiant beauty.
The musician's superb talent was evident in every note he played, captivating audiences with his virtuosity.

senses.definition: extremely great and amazing

examples.x: She had a terrific smile that brightened up the room and made everyone feel welcome.
His terrific sense of style was evident in his well-coordinated outfits and attention to detail.
Her terrific physique was the result of disciplined workouts and a healthy lifestyle.
Despite the challenging role, he delivered a terrific portrayal of the character, earning praise from critics and audiences alike.
The musician had a terrific voice that resonated with emotion and power, captivating listeners with every note.

senses.definition: having the characteristics that are typical of young people

examples.x: Despite her age, she had a youthful appearance, with smooth skin and a radiant smile.
His youthful energy and enthusiasm were contagious, inspiring those around him.
The actress maintained a youthful glow, with bright eyes and a lively demeanor.
Despite his busy schedule, he managed to maintain a youthful appearance through regular exercise and a healthy diet.
The model's youthful features and slender figure made her a favorite in the fashion industry.

senses.definition: having many wrinkles

examples.x: Despite her age, she had a radiant smile that lit up her wrinkly face.
His wrinkly hands showed signs of a life well-lived, with lines etched from years of hard work and experience.
The elderly gentleman had a wrinkly complexion, but his eyes sparkled with wisdom and kindness.
Despite her wrinkly skin, there was a youthful spirit about her that belied her age.
His wrinkly forehead furrowed in concentration as he worked on the crossword puzzle.

senses.definition: (of a woman) small in an attractive way

examples.x: She had a petite frame, with delicate features and slender limbs.
Despite her petite stature, she exuded confidence and grace wherever she went.
His petite girlfriend stood on tiptoe to kiss him goodbye, her small frame fitting perfectly into his arms.
The model's petite build made her a natural fit for runway shows featuring high-fashion designs.
Despite her advancing years, she maintained a petite figure through regular exercise and healthy eating habits.

senses.definition: (of a woman's body) having curves in an attractive way

examples.x: She had a shapely figure, with curves in all the right places.
Despite her advancing years, she maintained a shapely appearance through regular exercise and a healthy lifestyle.

senses.definition: (of a person) having a  pleasantly rounded and slightly full-bodied appearance

examples.x: She had a plump face with rosy cheeks that gave her a youthful appearance.
Despite her petite stature, she had a plump figure, with curves that spoke of good health and vitality.
The actress gained weight for the role, appearing plump and round-faced to portray the character accurately.
Despite her advancing years, she remained plump and cheerful, with a zest for life that was infectious.
Despite her best efforts to diet, she remained plump and curvaceous, embracing her natural body shape.

senses.definition: (of a woman's body) attractive because of having curves

examples.x: She had a curvy figure, with voluptuous hips and a narrow waist.
Despite her petite stature, she had a curvy silhouette that turned heads wherever she went.
The actress embraced her curvy physique, refusing to conform to unrealistic beauty standards.
Her curvy hips swayed seductively as she walked, exuding confidence and allure.
The model's curvy frame made her a popular choice for lingerie and swimsuit campaigns.

senses.definition: fat in an unattractive way

examples.x: The man's gross belly hung over his belt, emphasizing his unhealthy weight.
He had a gross, bloated appearance that was indicative of his excessive eating habits.
Her gross thighs rubbed together audibly as she walked, drawing attention to her obesity.
His gross obesity made it difficult for him to participate in physical activities or enjoy a normal quality of life.
The woman's gross size made it difficult for her to fit into standard chairs or clothing.

senses.definition: owning extraordinary qualities in a way that resembles those of God or a god
